title: Elementary Principal
notes: Small rural Putnam County district (one elementary K-6, 2024 National Blue Ribbon). No dedicated ECE or curriculum director; elementary principal is closest decision-maker over PreK/early grades. Superintendent: Nick Verhoff.

title: Director of Early Childhood Education
notes: Large urban district. All CPS preschools rated Gold by ODCY. Operates Department of Early Childhood Education; partner with Cincinnati Preschool Promise. Direct email not published; main ECE line 513-363-0123 (Option 5). Confirmed role via The Org and LinkedIn.

title: Director of Early Childhood Education / Director, Early Learning Center @ Schreiber
notes: Operates Early Learning Center @ Schreiber, Gold-rated ODCY program serving ages 3-5; curriculum aligned to Ohio Early Learning Standards. Strong ECE focus.

title: Supervisor of Special Education Preschool Support (Preschool Lead)
notes: Step Up to Quality Gold preschool, ODEW-licensed; PreK registration for 2026-27 routed via Butler County ESC. Sarah Burdette oversees preschool special ed support; Jayne Vanegas (jvanegas@hcsdoh.org) supervises Elementary/Pre-K.

title: Director of Preschool Services
notes: Dedicated Early Learning Center at 936 Eastwind Dr.; integrated preschool model. Clear district ECE lead.

title: Director of Special Programs (oversees Preschool)
notes: Hebron, OH (Licking County). Lakewood Preschool primarily early intervention for ages 3-6; Hohman is the listed contact for ECE evaluations and special programs.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum and Special Services
notes: Beavercreek Preschool Center serves ~237 PK students; Fiori leads curriculum and special services district-wide. Direct email not published on staff page; main district line 937-458-2000.

title: Director of Early Childhood Education / Preschool Director
notes: Lucas County Springfield Local (Holland, OH). Operates Early Childhood Center, 5-star Step Up to Quality. Confirmed via ZoomInfo and district site.

title: Associate Superintendent of Instruction
notes: Westlake Early Childhood Program (integrated PK at Redwood Elementary). Musselman is top instructional lead; preschool contact Christina McLoughlin (McLoughlinC@wlake.org) is admin/secretary. Curriculum aligned to Ohio ELDS.

title: Director of Curriculum & Gifted Instruction
notes: District has preschool, extended-day K, and Early Childhood Assistant Principal role posted. Price is the district C&I lead PreK-12.

title: Early Childhood Program Contact / Coordinator
notes: Integrated PK program for ages 3-5. Skelly is the listed program contact (waitlist + peer enrollment). Email not surfaced on district staff directory; phone is direct.

title: Preschool Registration / KECEC Office
notes: Uses Creative Curriculum aligned to Ohio ELDS. Pathfinders is ODE-grant-funded PreK program; 5 PK sites district-wide. Named director not surfaced publicly; central PK office is verified contact. Strong ECE buying signal — ODEW-funded Pathfinders preschool.

title: Director of Instruction and Professional Development
notes: Medina County district; runs Jump Start Preschool at Valley View Elementary. No dedicated ECE director surfaced; Jackson is district C&I lead.

title: Preschool Program Director / K-12 Special Ed Director
notes: Findlay City Schools Preschool (preschool.fcs.org). Nelson is both program director and special ed director; ~221 PK students.

title: LEAPS Preschool Contact (Integrated Preschool at Redwood Elementary)
notes: LEAPS = 5-Star Step Up to Quality, ~140 PK students. Curriculum lead is Natalie Fior (district Curriculum Director); Asst Supt Dr. Jack Dibee oversees C&I. Vince is the published preschool email contact.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Summit County. C&I team actively reviewing preschool curriculum with intent to implement Fall 2025 — strong buying signal. Green Primary School houses PK-1.

title: Superintendent
notes: Preschool administered through Clark County ESC (not district staff). No district ECE or C&I director surfaced; Superintendent Knapke is best district-level contact. Email format @greenonschools.org confirmed via ZoomInfo.

title: Elementary Principal
notes: Mahoning County small district; Kim Fisk is Director of Special Services. No dedicated ECE/curriculum director; elementary principal is closest decision-maker for PreK programming.

title: Elementary/Middle School Principal
notes: Maria Stein, Mercer County. 5-Star Step Up to Quality preschool aligned to Ohio ELDS. No dedicated ECE or curriculum director listed; elementary principal Thobe is closest decision-maker. Email inferred from confirmed @marionlocal.org pattern (Wilker = wilkern@marionlocal.org); Low confidence on exact format.

title: Director of Curriculum and Gifted
notes: Note: Jeffrey Mansion Preschool (Angela Buddendeck) is a City of Bexley parks/rec program, not the school district. Casey Cosgray is Chief Academic Officer. Nowak joined Bexley in 2024 from New Albany-Plain Local. Direct district email not surfaced in public results.

title: Coordinator of Early Childhood & Non-Public Schools Special Education Services
notes: Operates dedicated Early Learning Center (elc.napls.us) with peer-model program. Uses Changemakers content. Zieber confirmed role via ZoomInfo (email zieberj@napls.us format likely but not directly published).

title: Early Childhood Administrative Assistant (Athens-Meigs ESC, programs at ACS)
notes: FLAG: Richter's email is @athensmeigs.com (Athens-Meigs ESC), not the district domain. Athens City Schools (East Elementary, Morrison-Gordon, Eagles Nest Inclusion Pre-K) uses Creative Curriculum aligned to Ohio ELDS. Recommend asking ESC contact for district C&I lead, or contact ACS via main district line at acs-k12.org. ESC routing per skill guidance.

title: District Director of Preschool Programs / Wells Academy Principal
notes: Uses Success for All curriculum; WonderGarten program for late-birthday students. Email not public; reach via Wells Academy 740-282-1651 or board office 740-283-3767.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: PK-12 district, ~1,916 students; recently implemented new curriculum and wellness programs. Email pattern @gallipoliscityschools.k12.oh.us confirmed by multiple staff (per ZoomInfo); exact Hout email partially masked.

Pomeroy, OH. Preschool programs facilitated through Athens-Meigs ESC. No district ECE or curriculum director surfaced in public results. Recommend contacting district main office or Athens-Meigs ESC Deb Richter (deb.richter@athensmeigs.com, 740-797-0064) for routing.

title: Preschool Supervisor (Oak Hills Early Learning Center)
notes: Operates multi-age integrated PK program at OHELC and J.F. Dulles Elementary. Britney Eckstein is Preschool Supervisor at JF Dulles; Karen Floyd is District Preschool Administrator Assistant (513-722-7144). Email format @ohlsd.org confirmed (Lessing example).

title: Monroe Primary School Principal & Preschool Director
notes: Curriculum aligned to Ohio's State Standards. Nancy Stratton is Director of Pupil Personnel (nstratton@monroelocalschools.com, 513-539-2536 x7151). Email format @monroelocalschools.com confirmed; Giffen's exact email partially masked in public sources.

title: Director of Teaching and Learning
notes: District ECE is run via Hamilton County ESC (tuition-based at Terrace Park Elementary) and private Champions Preschool at Mariemont Elementary. Kromer leads K-12 curriculum reviews and adoption decisions.

title: Preschool Contact / Special Education Lead
notes: Reading Elementary Preschool is Gold-rated (Step Up to Quality). Instruction based on Ohio ELDS; both full-day and half-day. Sansone is the public preschool contact; email not surfaced.

title: Preschool Supervisor / Special Education Coordinator
notes: Frankfort, OH (Ross County). Operates three PK classrooms: ECI program + two ECE classrooms (2-day and 4-day). Strong ECE program.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Operates Little Comets Preschool and PK at Shupe. Hall leads district C&I; email format @amherstk12.org used by district but exact Hall address not public.

title: Elementary Principal
notes: Small Hancock County district (~578 students K-12). Preschool program administered by Hancock County ESC (special needs PK ages 3-5, contact Donna Losiewicz at HCESC 419-422-7525). Preschool teacher: Mrs. Lynn Vera. No district curriculum director; elementary principal is closest decision-maker.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Provides PreK-12 standards-based education leadership. No dedicated ECE director surfaced; Milcetich is top curriculum lead.

title: Director of Student Services (oversees Preschool)
notes: Clermont County. PK ages 3-5; currently full with 20+ waitlist for typically developing peers for 2025-26 — buying signal for ECE demand. No dedicated ECE director; Jacobs covers PK and special services.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: PreK-12 C&I oversight; district maintains Gold-rated preschool. Department structure includes 'Data, Assessment & Preschool'.

title: Director of Curriculum/Career Technology
notes: Oak Harbor district. Preschool teacher Mrs. Gabriellia O'Donnell uses @npesc.org (North Point ESC) — preschool services routed through ESC. Dr. Parmigian is district C&I lead; email format @bcssd.com confirmed (e.g., ghalsey@bcssd.com).

title: Superintendent
notes: Clermont County, ~1,377 students. District eliminated curriculum director role in 2026 budget cuts. No dedicated ECE staff identified. Superintendent Kircher is best contact. Director of Student Services Mary Beth Tucker is secondary.

South Webster, Scioto County. Former superintendent Marc Kreischer passed away Feb 2026; current superintendent not yet listed publicly. No dedicated ECE/curriculum director surfaced. Recommend phoning district office to identify current top admin.

title: Superintendent
notes: Single PK-12 building in Darke County. No dedicated ECE or curriculum director; superintendent is appropriate contact for small district. Elementary Principal Michelle Lavey is secondary.

title: Preschool Director
notes: Trumbull County. Operates PK for 3-4 and 4-5 year olds Tue-Thu/Mon-Thu. Berena is named preschool director; email not surfaced publicly. Reach via 330-448-2443.
